'''thafawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thamnornis|thamnornis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-f-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thamnornis|thamnornis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thafawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæfæwæth|thæfæwæth]] || [[word:thæfæwæj|thæfæwæj]] || [[word:thæfæwæsh|thæfæwæsh]] || [[word:thæfæwæ|thæfæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thafafawath|thafafawath]] || [[word:thafafawaj|thafafawaj]] || [[word:thafafawash|thafafawash]] || [[word:thafafawa|thafafawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafawath|thafawath]] || [[word:thafawaj|thafawaj]] || [[word:thafawash|thafawash]] || [[word:thafawa|thafawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafafwath|thafafwath]] || [[word:thafafwaj|thafafwaj]] || [[word:thafafwash|thafafwash]] || [[word:thafafwaf|thafafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thafawatha|thafawatha]] || [[word:thafawaja|thafawaja]] || [[word:thafawasha|thafawasha]] || [[word:thafawaka|thafawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thafawath|thafawath]] || [[word:thafawaj|thafawaj]] || [[word:thafawash|thafawash]] || [[word:thafawa|thafawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thafawathal|thafawathal]] || [[word:thafawajal|thafawajal]] || [[word:thafawashal|thafawashal]] || [[word:thafawakal|thafawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thafawathatha|thafawathatha]] || [[word:thafawajaja|thafawajaja]] || [[word:thafawashasha|thafawashasha]] || [[word:thafawaka|thafawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thafawathan|thafawathan]] || [[word:thafawajan|thafawajan]] || [[word:thafawashan|thafawashan]] || [[word:thafawakan|thafawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thafawathaoro|thafawathaoro]] || [[word:thafawajaoro|thafawajaoro]] || [[word:thafawashaoro|thafawashaoro]] || [[word:thafawakaoro|thafawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
